title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!
